active_visual_authorities.role: sole theme, token, component-default, focus, motion, shape and elevation authority
sole bounded operator empty, error, loading, fact-grid, tone and reduced-motion scroll authority

resolved_findings.resolution: Routes use MUI Chip only for compact state or metadata; counts use Typography and operational status includes text plus non-color cues.

resolved_findings.finding: Card and border grammar was the default structure
resolved_findings.resolution: Workspace, Knowledge, Channels, Runtime and Control Tower use MUI lists, tables, sections, dividers and continuous surfaces.

resolved_findings.finding: Shared empty, error, loading and fact states were copied or incomplete
resolved_findings.resolution: One bounded OperatorPresentation module owns those semantic compositions without wrapping Button, Input or Dialog.

resolved_findings.finding: Workspace JSX and CSS selectors had drifted
resolved_findings.resolution: Workspace uses MUI and both Workspace stylesheets are deleted.

resolved_findings.finding: Case journey lacked a dominant visual structure
resolved_findings.resolution: The MUI Workspace renders a truthful Case Spine and explicitly marks missing closure facts.
Domain mappings remain while generic state rendering uses one OperatorPresentation authority and one MUI theme.
Navigation and route copy use one operator-language contract; technical IDs are progressively disclosed.

resolved_findings.finding: Runtime audit had an independent minified CSS system
resolved_findings.resolution: Runtime audit uses MUI and the shared semantic presentation authority; its stylesheet is deleted.

resolved_findings.finding: Knowledge read and manage modes were separate page implementations
resolved_findings.resolution: One KnowledgePage owns list, filters, details, search testing and capability-gated editing through canManage.

resolved_findings.finding: Workspace orchestration contained queue, evidence, conversation and state helpers in one giant file
resolved_findings.resolution: One Workspace route now composes bounded queue, case, conversation, common presentation and state-transition modules without another store, API or renderer.

resolved_findings.finding: Route loading fallbacks retained deleted CSS classes
resolved_findings.resolution: Knowledge, Channels, Runtime and Control Tower use one MUI RouteLoadingState.

resolved_findings.finding: Feature TSX contained theme-bypassing color literals
resolved_findings.resolution: Source colors are theme semantic values; the architecture gate rejects raw color literals outside nexusTheme.ts.

route_results.functional_behavior_preserved: queue, deep links, drafts, actions, authorization, confirmations, bounded history and event refresh
one capability-aware search, selection, detail, edit, publish and retrieval-test implementation
account health and onboarding task lifecycle
runtime reads, metrics and evidence audit
compatibility redirect only; no operator UI

remaining_acceptance: Regenerate package-lock.json from the exact package.json manifest.
Run architecture, lint, typecheck, contract tests and production build on one unchanged Head.
Run browser evidence at 375, 768, 1024 and 1440 widths.
Verify keyboard, focus, reduced motion, zoom, long content, degraded states and large lists.
Obtain independent exact-head review before merge.
